prompt: Customer asks: I forgot my password.
completion: Please use the “Forgot password” link on the sign-in page. If you don’t receive the reset email within 5 minutes, check your spam folder. If it still doesn’t arrive, reply with your workspace name and account email so we can help manually.

prompt: Customer asks: The password reset email never arrived.
completion: First, check your spam and promotions folders for an email from AcornDesk. If there is nothing there after 5–10 minutes, confirm that you entered the correct login email and then contact support with your workspace name so we can trigger a manual reset.

prompt: Customer asks: I no longer have access to the email I used to sign up.
completion: For security reasons, we cannot change your login email without verification. Please send us the old email address, the new email address, your workspace name, and the last four digits of the card on file. Our team will verify ownership and then update your login email.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I change my login email?
completion: To change your login email, go to Settings → Profile and update the Email field. We will send a confirmation link to the new address. Once you confirm, you can sign in with the new email.

prompt: Customer asks: I see a message saying too many failed login attempts.
completion: This means your account is temporarily locked for security reasons. Wait 15 minutes and then try again using the correct email and password. If you still cannot log in, use the password reset link or contact support with your workspace name.

prompt: Customer asks: How long is the AcornDesk free trial?
completion: The standard AcornDesk free trial is 14 days. During the trial, you can invite up to 5 teammates and use all core features, including ticketing, automation rules, and reports.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I extend my trial?
completion: Yes, we offer one 7-day trial extension for evaluation. Reply with your workspace name, team size, and how you plan to use AcornDesk, and we will apply the extension if you haven’t already received one.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I have a second trial extension?
completion: Second trial extensions are granted case by case. If your team has more than 20 seats or a complex rollout, share your expected seat count and timeline. We may extend the trial or connect you with sales for a short proof-of-concept plan.

prompt: Customer asks: What happens when my trial ends?
completion: When your trial ends, your workspace remains accessible in read-only mode for 30 days. To keep using AcornDesk without interruption, add a payment method and select a plan before the trial expires.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I upgrade from trial to a paid plan?
completion: To upgrade from trial to a paid plan, go to Settings → Billing, add your payment method, and select either a monthly or annual plan. Your trial data and settings will carry over automatically.

prompt: Customer asks: Do you offer refunds on annual plans?
completion: Yes. Annual plans can be refunded within 14 days of the first payment. To request a refund, contact support with your workspace name, billing email, and a brief reason for cancellation.

prompt: Customer asks: Do you offer refunds on monthly plans?
completion: Monthly plans are generally non-refundable once the billing period has started. If you believe you were charged in error, contact support with your workspace name and billing email so we can review your case.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I request a refund?
completion: To request a refund, please contact support within 14 days of your first annual payment. Include your workspace name, billing email, invoice number if available, and a short explanation so our billing team can review your request.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I get a refund if my team never used the product?
completion: We review unused annual subscriptions individually. If your team has not used AcornDesk after activation, share your workspace name and billing email. Our billing team will check usage and let you know if a refund is possible.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I cancel my subscription?
completion: To cancel your subscription, go to Settings → Billing and click “Cancel plan.” Your workspace will remain active until the end of the current billing period. After that, it will move to read-only mode for 30 days before data is deleted.

prompt: Customer asks: If I cancel now, will I be charged again?
completion: After you cancel in Settings → Billing, you will not be charged again unless you reactivate your subscription. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I pause my subscription instead of canceling?
completion: We don’t currently support pausing subscriptions. You can cancel now and reactivate at any time. Your workspace will remain in read-only mode with limited access for 30 days after cancellation before data is removed.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I downgrade from Pro to Starter?
completion: To downgrade, go to Settings → Billing and select the Starter plan. The downgrade will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Your existing data will be preserved, but some Pro features will be disabled.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I upgrade from Starter to Pro?
completion: To upgrade, go to Settings → Billing and choose the Pro plan. The upgrade is effective immediately, and a prorated charge will be applied for the remainder of the current billing period.

prompt: Customer asks: Do you support prorated upgrades?
completion: Yes. When you upgrade from a lower plan to a higher one, we calculate a prorated charge for the remaining time in your current billing period, so you only pay for the difference.

prompt: Customer asks: Where can I download my invoices?
completion: You can download invoices from Settings → Billing → Invoices. Each invoice can be viewed in your browser or downloaded as a PDF for your records.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I receive invoices by email?
completion: Yes. By default, invoices are sent to the billing contact email on file. You can update this address under Settings → Billing → Billing contact email.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I change the billing contact email?
completion: To change the billing contact email, go to Settings → Billing and update the Billing contact email field. Future invoices and billing notifications will be sent to the new address.

prompt: Customer asks: Our finance team needs a copy of the last 6 invoices.
completion: Please go to Settings → Billing → Invoices and download the last 6 invoices as PDFs. If you’re unable to access them, share your workspace name and billing email and our team can email them to you.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I invite a teammate to AcornDesk?
completion: To invite a teammate, go to Settings → Team and click “Invite teammate.” Enter their email address, choose a role, and send the invite. They will receive an email with a link to join your workspace.

prompt: Customer asks: How many teammates can I invite during the trial?
completion: During the trial you can invite up to 5 teammates. After upgrading to a paid plan, you can add more seats at any time from Settings → Team.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I limit what my teammates can do?
completion: Yes. When inviting or editing a teammate, you can assign roles such as Agent, Admin, or Viewer. Each role has different permissions for tickets, settings, and reports.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I remove a teammate who left the company?
completion: To remove a teammate, go to Settings → Team, click on the teammate’s name, and select “Deactivate user.” This will revoke their access while keeping their historical activity on tickets.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I change a teammate’s role from Agent to Admin?
completion: Yes. Go to Settings → Team, select the teammate, and change their role to Admin. Save the changes to update their access immediately.

prompt: Customer asks: Does AcornDesk integrate with email?
completion: Yes. You can connect your support email addresses under Settings → Channels → Email. Incoming messages to those addresses will automatically create tickets in AcornDesk.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I connect my support email inbox?
completion: Go to Settings → Channels → Email and click “Connect inbox.” Choose your email provider and follow the prompts. Once connected, new messages will create tickets in AcornDesk.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I set up Slack notifications?
completion: To set up Slack notifications, go to Settings → Integrations → Slack and authorize the AcornDesk app. You can then choose which channels should receive ticket updates.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I export my tickets before cancelling?
completion: Yes. Before cancelling, go to Settings → Data export and request a ticket export. We will generate a CSV that you can download and store for your records.

prompt: Customer asks: How long do you keep data after cancellation?
completion: After cancellation, workspaces remain in read-only mode for 30 days. During that time you can export data. After 30 days, we begin deleting workspace data from our systems.

prompt: Customer asks: Is my data backed up?
completion: Yes. AcornDesk data is backed up regularly and stored in secure, redundant infrastructure. Backups are for disaster recovery and are not meant as a replacement for your own exports.

prompt: Customer asks: Do you support SSO login?
completion: Yes. Single sign-on (SSO) is available on our Business and Enterprise plans. To enable SSO, contact support or your account manager so we can help with setup.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I update my payment method?
completion: To update your payment method, go to Settings → Billing and click “Update payment method.” Enter the new card details and save. The new card will be used for future renewals.

prompt: Customer asks: Our payment failed; what should I do?
completion: If a payment fails, please check that your card details are correct and that your bank has not blocked the transaction. You can update your card under Settings → Billing and retry the payment.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I pay annually instead of monthly?
completion: Yes. You can switch from monthly to annual billing under Settings → Billing by selecting an annual plan. The new term and pricing will start at your next renewal date.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I switch from annual to monthly billing?
completion: You can switch from annual to monthly when your current annual period ends. Contact support or your account manager before renewal so we can adjust your plan at the next cycle.

prompt: Customer asks: Where can I see my current plan details?
completion: Your current plan, seat count, and next renewal date are visible under Settings → Billing at the top of the page.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I see which agents are currently online?
completion: You can see active agents from the Live View page in the navigation bar. It shows which teammates are online and which queues they’re working.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I limit support hours?
completion: Yes. You can configure business hours under Settings → Business hours. Tickets created outside of business hours can be tagged or routed differently using automation rules.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I create custom ticket fields?
completion: Yes. Custom ticket fields can be created under Settings → Ticket fields. You can add fields like Customer tier, Region, or Product line and make them required on specific forms.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I contact support if none of this helps?
completion: If you still need help, please contact AcornDesk support via the in-app chat or by emailing support@acorndesk.example with your workspace name and a description of the issue.
